subcodes.first_line: O ye divine friends! From the Kingdom of Holiness doth the Ancient Beauty and the Most Great Name, through His ancient grace, bestow upon His loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی جمال قدم و اسم اعظم از ملکوت تقدیس بفیض قدیم احبای خویش را بفوز
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
